description: Frame is of high quality and was tough enough to survive my getting them adjusted. I have a significant prescription and the price for lenses was significantly below Warby Parker!

The frame is good, however, what I did not foresee was that the little bolts on the lenses, which attach the nose pieces will take some time to get used to because they somehow are visible. It is something you really can't notice without trying on. I got prescription lenses and they are pretty thick even though I picket the recommended best value middle option. I would go with the finest option next time. I am comparing the lens thickness with that of my prescription everyday transition lenses from my optometrist and they are more than 2x thicker. title: Oakley OO9517 Stunt Devil Prizm Yellow Sunglasses Online
product_name: Oakley OO9517 Stunt Devil Prizm Yellow
description: Driven by innovation and performance, Oakley is known for eyewear built to handle real movement. With a focus on advanced design, secure fits, and bold aesthetics, Oakley glasses and sunglasses are made for those who like their style with an edge and their eyewear ready for action.

extra_attributes.description_local: The Oakley Stunt Devil sunglasses are the ultimate sports model for your next athletic endeavor. Crafted from strong, durable O-matter, these Oakley shades feature HyperGrip for a more secure fit, and unobtainium nosepads for maximum comfort, boosting your performance with style.

title: Celine CL40252I White Prescription Sunglasses
description: The Celine CL40252I is a bold statement frame made for those with a daring sense of style. Crafted from high-grade acetate, these Celine sunglasses feature a striking chunky front, refined tri-rivet detailing at the temples, and classic brand lettering for a look that’s both confident and unmistakably chic.

title: Dior CD Diamond S5I Tortoise, Green Prescription Sunglasses
product_name: Dior CD Diamond S5I Tortoise, Green
description: The Dior CD Diamond S5I is a stunning sunglasses frame exuding glamour combined with undeniable cool. Crafted from premium acetate, these Dior sunglasses feature CD icons at the hinges on both sides, Christian Dior signature on the inner right temple, and molded nose pads for comfort.

title: Off-White Charlotte Red Prescription Sunglasses
description: The Off-White Charlotte is a stylishly chunky frame with an undeniable presence. Crafted in Italy from high-grade acetate, these Off-White sunglasses showcase elegant design lines, classic logo lettering, and curves tips for a comfy fit.

title: Off-White Edison Shiny Black Prescription Sunglasses
description: The Off-White Edison is a unique oval frame with creative cuts and angles. Crafted in Italy from high-grade acetate, these Off-White sunglasses feature signature arrow icons, curved tips, and sculpted nose pads for a snug fit.

title: Spy Marshall 2.0 Ski Goggles Black, Blue Glasses Online
product_name: Spy Marshall 2.0 Ski Goggles Black, Blue
description: The Spy Marshall 2.0 Ski Goggles update the fan-favorite design with even better comfort and performance. They feature a wider strap for a more secure feel and SPY+’s Rise™ Ventilation System to help prevent fogging. Crafted from partially recycled materials, they’re built for clearer, cleaner runs all season long.

title: Oakley Meta OW8001 Vanguard AI Glasses Prizm Black, Red Sunglasses Online
product_name: Oakley Meta OW8001 Vanguard AI Glasses Prizm Black, Red
description: The Oakley Meta Vanguard is built for athletes who never slow down, fusing elite sport performance with cutting-edge Meta AI technology. Its centered, ultra-wide 12MP camera captures hands-free POV action in stunning 3K, while open-ear speakers deliver immersive sound that keeps you focused mid-run, ride, or rep. Integrated Meta AI connects with Garmin and Strava for real-time fitness insights, helping you train smarter and push further. Featuring Oakley’s Prizm lens technology for unmatched clarity in any light, plus a durable frame engineered to handle sweat, water, and extreme conditions. From your first track to your final rep, these Oakley smart glasses turn every moment into a highlight.

title: Revel Maximus Matte Black Prescription Sunglasses
description: The Revel Maximus is a stylish square sunglasses frame from the newest drop by our Revel brand, built around masculine and unisex sporty appeal. Crafted from lightweight, durable TR-90, it features a flexible nose bridge, bend-friendly temples for wider fits, and sculpted nose pads for a comfortable, secure feel.

title: Givenchy GV40075F Orange, Clear Prescription Sunglasses
description: The Givenchy GV40075F is a stunning sunglasses frame that'll turn heads wherever you wear it. Crafted from acetate, these Givenchy shades flaunt a fun hue, classic brand detail on the temple, and molded nose pads for comfort.

title: Kenzo KZ40162I Shiny Black Prescription Sunglasses
description: The Kenzo KZ40162I is a flamboyant cat-eye frame made for those who love to stand out. Crafted from acetate, these Kenzo shades feature a bold frame front, KENZO PARIS lettering on the temples, and molded nose pads for comfort.

title: Kenzo KZ40164U Shiny Black Prescription Sunglasses
description: The Kenzo KZ40164U is a slick-looking sunglasses frame that's perfect for sun-kissed days. Crafted from acetate, these Kenzo shades feature a lustrous hue, signature brand detail, and molded nose pads for comfort.

title: Jacquemus Bambino Shiny Black Prescription Sunglasses

title: Jacquemus Sera Matte Black Prescription Sunglasses

A confident statement piece with unmistakable designer edge.

title: Ray-Ban Meta Smart Glasses RW4014 (Gen 2.0) Skyler Shiny Black, Gray Sunglasses Online
product_name: Ray-Ban Meta AI Glasses RW4014 (Gen 2.0) Skyler Shiny Black, Gray
description: Bring a modern edge to Gen 2 of Ray-Ban’s Smart Glasses with the Skyler frame. Meta AI keeps you connected on the move so you can set reminders, ask for suggestions, or chat hands-free with live translation across multiple languages. Snap photos and videos in stunning detail with the ultrawide 12 MP camera, share your perspective instantly by livestreaming to Instagram or Facebook, and switch smoothly between your phone and POV view during calls. With discreet open-ear speakers for rich audio that keeps you aware of your surroundings, extended battery life, a portable charging case, and responsive touch controls, the Skyler is built for all-day creativity and connection. Available in polarized.
